docs.title: 🏠 Welcome to my Hyprland Config
docs.text: A heavily customized, plug-and-play dynamic tiling Wayland compositor setup on Arch Linux. This configuration features a custom Waybar with weather and media player integration, Rofi launchers, and a smooth, aesthetic workflow powered by the dwindle layout.

docs.title: ✨ Highlights
docs.text:
• Custom Waybar: A centered top bar featuring 11 persistent workspaces, a live weather module, media player controls, and system stats.
  • App Launcher: Rofi configured with a custom blue theme and the elegant Z003 font.
  • Dynamic Media: Laptop multimedia keys fully bound for volume, brightness, and playerctl integration.
  • Visuals: 6px rounded corners, subtle blur effects, and a cyan/green active border gradient.

docs.title: 📸 Gallery
docs.text: Here are various screenshots of the Hyprland setup in action.

docs.title: 🛠️ Installation
docs.text: This configuration is designed to be deployed easily on Arch Linux.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
Ensure you have the following packages installed on your Arch system:

Core: - hyprland - waybar - rofi - swaybg - swaync (Notification center)

Scripts & Utilities: - grim & slurp (Screenshots) - playerctl (Media player bindings) - brightnessctl (Laptop backlight) - wpctl (Wireplumber/Pipewire volume) - pavucontrol (Volume GUI) - btop (System monitor, launched from Waybar) - nm-applet (Network manager tray) - python (Required for the weather script)

docs.title: Deploying the Config
docs.text:
1. Clone the repository: bash git clone https://codeberg.org/WgpArch/hyprland.git ~/.dotfiles/hyprland

  2. Symlink the configurations to your ~/.config directory: bash ln -sf ~/.dotfiles/hyprland/configs/hypr ~/.config/hypr ln -sf ~/.dotfiles/hyprland/configs/waybar ~/.config/waybar

  3. Ensure scripts are executable: bash chmod +x ~/.config/waybar/scripts/*

  4. Start Hyprland from your TTY or display manager!

docs.title: ⌨️ Keybinds
docs.text: Here are the default keybindings for this Hyprland setup. The main modifier key is set to SUPER (the Windows/Command key).

docs.title: 🖥️ Programs & Windows
docs.text: Keybind Action SUPER + Q Open Terminal (lxterminal) SUPER + E Open File Manager (pcmanfm) SUPER + R Open App Launcher (rofi with custom blue theme) SUPER + C Close active window SUPER + V Toggle floating mode SUPER + M Exit Hyprland SUPER + P Pseudotile (dwindle)

docs.title: 🔍 Focus & Movement
docs.text: Keybind Action SUPER + Arrow Keys Move focus left/right/up/down SUPER + Mouse Scroll Cycle through workspaces

docs.title: 🗂️ Workspaces
docs.text:
Workspaces 1 through 11 are persistent (always visible on the bar).

Keybind Action SUPER + [1-0] Switch to workspace 1-10 SUPER + SHIFT + [1-0] Move active window to workspace 1-10 SUPER + S Toggle special workspace (scratchpad) SUPER + SHIFT + S Move window to special workspace

docs.title: 🖱️ Mouse
docs.text: Keybind Action SUPER + Left Click Drag Move window SUPER + Right Click Drag Resize window

docs.title: 🔊 Media & System Keys
docs.text: Keybind Action Volume Up Increase volume by 5% (wpctl) Volume Down Decrease volume by 5% (wpctl) Mute Toggle audio mute Mic Mute Toggle microphone mute Brightness Up Increase backlight by 10% (brightnessctl) Brightness Down Decrease backlight by 10% (brightnessctl) Play/Pause Media play/pause (playerctl) Next Next track (playerctl) Previous Previous track (playerctl) SUPER + Print Screenshot and save to ~/Pictures/Screenshots/

docs.title: 🎨 Look & Feel
docs.text: This Hyprland config prioritizes a clean, modern aesthetic with smooth animations and subtle transparency effects, perfectly matching the custom Waybar.

docs.title: General Layout
docs.text:
• Layout: Dwindle (default Hyprland dynamic tiling)
  • Gaps (Inner): 4px
  • Gaps (Outer): 8px
  • Border Size: 2px

docs.title: Borders
docs.text:
• Active Border: A 45-degree gradient between Cyan (#33ccff) and Green (#00ff99).
  • Inactive Border: A dark semi-transparent grey (#595959aa).

docs.title: Decoration & Blur
docs.text:
• Rounding: 6px rounded corners on all windows.
  • Blur: Enabled with a size of 3 and 1 pass for a subtle frosted glass effect behind windows.
  • Opacity: Active and inactive windows are set to 1.0 (fully opaque) for maximum readability.
  • Wallpaper: Managed by swaybg, set to scale a custom BlueCity wallpaper.

docs.title: Animations
docs.text: Animations are enabled using a custom bezier curve for smooth transitions: - Windows: 7ms smooth pop-in effect (80%). - Borders: 10ms color and angle transitions. - Fade: 7ms fade in/out. - Workspaces: 6ms transition when switching.

docs.title: Fonts
docs.text:
• System/Bar Font: Z003 (install via AUR gsfonts)
  • Fallback Icons: JetBrainsMono Nerd Font

docs.title: 📊 Waybar & Scripts
docs.text: This setup uses a custom Waybar positioned at the top center, launched specifically with style1.css and a width of 1350px to create a floating aesthetic.

docs.title: 📐 Bar Layout
docs.text: The bar is divided into three sections:

docs.title: Left
docs.text:
• Custom Launcher: Displays the Arch Linux icon. Clicking it opens the custom Rofi menu.
  • Hyprland Workspaces: Displays 11 persistent workspaces. Scroll up/down to cycle through them.
  • System Tray: Standard app tray.

docs.title: Center
docs.text:
• Clock: Displays date and time in Mon DD HH:MM:SS AM/PM format. Right-click to change modes. Includes a detailed calendar tooltip.
  • Custom Weather: Displays current weather conditions via a custom Python script.

docs.title: Right
docs.text:
• Custom Player: 🎵 Shows current media playback (via player.sh).
  • Backlight: Screen brightness with scroll support.
  • Pulseaudio: Volume control. Click to open pavucontrol.
  • CPU: CPU usage percentage. Click to open btop.
  • Battery: Battery percentage with icon states (charging, full, critical).
  • Custom Notifications: SwayNC integration. Click to toggle, right-click for DND.
  • Memory: RAM usage percentage.
  • Storage: Disk usage percentage.
  • Custom Power: Power button. Click to open the Rofi power menu.

docs.title: 📜 Key Scripts
docs.text: Script Location Description weather.py ~/.config/waybar/scripts/ Fetches weather data and formats it for the Waybar JSON output. player.sh ~/.config/waybar/scripts/ Fetches current media metadata from MPRIS/playerctl. rofi-power-menu.sh ~/.config/rofi/ Custom Rofi script for logout, reboot, and shutdown options.
